chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3930 of 2025 TMC Gadap Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 16199/25 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.08.2025 Mr. Ahmed Masood, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, Assistant Advocate General along with Mian Muhammad Hussain SDI/PI Bin Qasim Sub-Division Malir, Karachi, and Sheral Khoso, SDI/PI Gadap Sub-Division Malir Karachi. -.-.- Mr. Altaf Hussain Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.4, which is taken on record. Comments filed on behalf of Respondent No.9 are also taken on record. There is a dispute between Petitioner TMC Gadap and Respondent No.2 TMC Ibrahim Hyderi over collection of tax on milching animals and health care service on milching animals. Therefore, relevant proceedings were filed before the Provincial Commission, which determined the jurisdiction of each TMCs. However, both the parties are interpreting the said order in their favour and are disputing over the collection of aforesaid tax in respect of above issues. Proviso to Section 120(d) of Sindh Local Government Act, 2013 provides that in case of any dispute between the two councils, the Chief Minister is the competent authority to decide the same. Both the parties here agree that they will approach the Chief Minister Sindh for the above purpose and till the proceedings are decided by the Chief Minister the parties shall maintain status quo. The petition, along with listed application, stands disposed of in the above terms with consent. Judge Judge
